task_text:
Read invoices.csv and tell me how many invoices have an Amount Owed greater
than $200, and which customers they belong to.

content.text: Sure! Let me start by reading the file.

content.content:
Name,Email,Amount Owed,Due Date
Jordan Ellis,jordan.ellis@example.com,150.00,2026-06-01
Priya Nair,priya.nair@example.com,75.50,2026-06-05
Marcus Webb,marcus.webb@example.com,220.00,2026-05-28
Sofia Reyes,sofia.reyes@example.com,0.00,2026-06-10
Tyler Brooks,tyler.brooks@example.com,340.25,2026-05-15

content.text:
Here's the analysis of the invoices with an **Amount Owed greater than $200**:

| # | Customer | Amount Owed |
|---|----------|-------------|
| 1 | Marcus Webb | $220.00 |
| 2 | Tyler Brooks | $340.25 |

**Total: 2 invoices** exceed $200. The remaining 3 customers (Jordan Ellis at $150.00, Priya Nair at $75.50, and Sofia Reyes at $0.00) are all at or below the $200 threshold.
